title: Talk To Me (2023)
description: Talk To Me follows the life of a man who invents a device that allows him to communicate with digital devices, crossing the boundary between humans and machines. As he becomes more engrossed in technology, he starts neglecting his personal relationships. The movie also deals with themes such as the implications of technology, sacrifice, and the importance of human connection.

title: The Great Dictator
description: 'The Great Dictator' is a political satire, where Charlie Chaplin plays two roles - a Jewish barber and a dictator resembling Hitler. The barber suffers from amnesia due to war but is mistaken for the dictator. The film culminates in a powerful speech about humanity, breaking the persona of the dictator.

title: How to Train Your Dragon
description: How to Train Your Dragon is an animated adventure movie that revolves around a young Viking named Hiccup, who aspires to follow his tribe's tradition of becoming a dragon slayer. However, after finally capturing his first dragon, he finds that he no longer wants to kill it and instead befriends the creature, who he names Toothless. Together, they embark on an adventure that will change both their lives and their village forever.

title: Psycho
description: Psycho is a classic horror thriller by Alfred Hitchcock, which tells the story of Marion Crane, a secretary who steals $40,000 from her employer. She ends up at the Bates Motel, run by the strange Norman Bates and his controlling mother. After Marion is murdered in a shocking shower scene, her sister Lila and boyfriend Sam Loomis investigate, unveiling Norman's chilling secret.

title: 12 Years a Slave
description: Based on a true story, 12 Years a Slave follows the life of Solomon Northup, a free African American man living in New York, who is kidnapped and sold into slavery in the South. For twelve years, he endures the brutal conditions of slavery while yearning for his freedom and his family. His endurance and hope ultimately lead to his freedom.

title: Kimi no na wa.
description: Kimi no na wa., also known as Your Name., is a poignant tale of two high school students, Mitsuha and Taki, living different lives in rural Itomori and bustling Tokyo, respectively. They start to have mysterious dreams where they inhabit each other's bodies, leading to a series of comedic mix-ups. As they establish a connection despite their differences and distance, they are drawn into a race against fate to prevent a looming catastrophe threatening Mitsuha's town.

title: Singin' in the Rain
description: 'Singin' in the Rain' is a comedy-musical that tells the story of the transition from silent movies to talkies. It focuses on a successful on-screen pair, Don Lockwood and Lina Lamont, whose careers are threatened by Lina's comically awful voice. Meanwhile, Don falls for Kathy Selden, a talented actress, and singer, who dubs for Lina to save their film, but later gets the recognition she deserves. The iconic song and dance sequence in the rain is a highlight of the movie.

title: Citizen Kane
description: Citizen Kane is a story about Charles Foster Kane, a newspaper magnate known for his overwhelming ambition and tragically flawed nature. title: The Usual Suspects
description: "The Usual Suspects" is a crime thriller film that revolves around a group of criminals who meet in a police lineup and subsequently plan a heist. However, things take a turn when they realize they're being used by a legendary, mystical figure named Keyser Söze. In the end, it's revealed that one of the criminals - Verbal Kint, is actually Keyser Söze himself, who narrates a fabricated story to the police.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
description: 'The Fellowship of the Ring' is the first film in 'The Lord of the Rings' trilogy. It tells the tale of the unassuming Frodo Baggins who inherits a ring from his elderly cousin Bilbo. This is no ordinary ring, as it is revealed to be the One Ring, a powerful artifact that the Dark Lord Sauron wants to regain and use to enslave the world of Middle-earth. Frodo, along with his friends and a fellowship of races including Elves, Dwarves, and Men, embarks on a critical mission to Mount Doom to destroy the ring and crush the growing threat of shadow and despair.

Ripley is recruited to join a team of Colonial Marines who are sent to investigate after communication with the colony is lost, and they discover a hive of xenomorphs that have taken over.

title: Life of Brian
description: "Life of Brian" is a comedic film about a young man named Brian who was born on the same day as, and next door to, Jesus Christ. The movie satirically explores various aspects of the human condition through Brian’s misadventures.

Summarized Movie Version:

'Gone Girl' tells the chilling story of a failing marriage where a wife plots an elaborate deception to frame her husband for murder. The husband's struggle to prove his innocence amidst media frenzy and changing public opinion forms the crux of the tale. It climaxes with the shocking revelation of the wife's deception and an unsettling reconciliation.

title: Modern Times

Along the way, he meets a young orphan girl, and they stick together in the face of these adversities, never losing hope or laughter.

description: In 1944 Spain, a young girl named Ofelia with a love for books and fairy tales discovers a labyrinth near her new home. In the labyrinth, she meets a mystical Faun who gives her three tasks to prove that she is the reincarnation of the underworld princess. As she tries to complete the tasks amidst a cruel and war-torn world, Ofelia explores the blurred lines between fantasy and reality.

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
description: 'To Kill a Mockingbird' is set in the American South during the Depression. Atticus Finch, a dignified, fair-minded lawyer, defends Tom Robinson, a Black man falsely accused of rape. Atticus' two children, Scout and Jem, discover the prejudices and inequalities in society. This coming-of-age story handles themes of racism, injustice, and innocence.

title: On the Waterfront
description: On the Waterfront revolves around Terry Malloy, a young dockworker who gets tangled up in the corrupt and violent union activities at the waterfront. Terry, initially hesitant to stand up against the corruption, is challenged by a strong-willed local priest and Edie, the sister of a murdered dockworker. Spurred by a newfound conscience, Terry becomes a witness for the Waterfront Crime Commission against the Union Boss, paving the way for justice.

title: Amadeus
description: 'Amadeus' is a period drama that traces the life of Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart through the eyes of his contemporary and secret rival, Antonio Salieri. The movie offers a dramatized version of Mozart’s life filled with triumphs, failures, and a heart-wrenching end. Despite Salieri's complex feelings of jealousy and admiration towards Mozart, he ultimately takes a step toward his own downfall in orchestrating Mozart's demise by indulging in deceit and manipulation.

title: Fanny and Alexander
description: Fanny and Alexander is a sweeping family saga by Ingmar Bergman. Set in early 20th-century Sweden, the film follows the lives of the wealthy Ekdahl family, predominantly through the eyes of siblings Fanny and Alexander. The death of the siblings' father drastically changes their lives as their mother goes on to marry a strict bishop. The children's world of comfort and creativity clashes with the bishop's harsh and ascetic lifestyle.

title: Die Hard
description: Die Hard is an action-packed film that follows the story of New York Police Detective John McClane. Unexpectedly, he ends up in an LA skyscraper during a Christmas party while it's overtaken by terrorists. With everyone else held hostage, McClane fights back, using his wits and resourcefulness against the gang, hoping to foil their plot and save the hostages, which include his estranged wife.

title: Hacksaw Ridge
